description: Style NoteThis fastrack watch gets a new season update in its styling and design details. For maximum impact, style this with your off-duty staples and throw on a few tonal accessories for added measure. This zingy time piece is sure to give a face-lift to your summer wardrobe!Product DetailsCase style:  Analog watch with black plastic round case Dial style: White dial with silver hands and printed text on the dialStrap style: White rubber strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the dial Water resistant 30 M that can be used around sinks and rain splashesWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 36 mmCase thickness: 8 mm
